channel.title: Saurabh Jain
channel.description: Security engineer writing about cloud security, bug bounties, AWS, and the grey areas no one puts on a slide deck.

item.title: Unauthenticated Access to AWS via Cognito Identity Pool ID
item.description: How an exposed Cognito Identity Pool ID can hand attackers temporary AWS credentials — no login required.

item.title: 20+ Vulnerabilities in a Static Website
item.description: No database, no backend, no APIs — still 20+ findings. Here's the bug bounty cheat sheet for static sites.

item.title: Recon to Responsible Disclosure
item.description: From rejected duplicates and out-of-scope reports to a methodical recon process that actually works.

item.title: Integrating Shodan and Censys API Keys into Subfinder
item.description: A step-by-step guide to enhancing Subfinder with Shodan, Censys, and SecurityTrails API keys to dramatically increase subdomain discovery coverage during recon.
